# Image Analysis for Plant Phenotyping — pip fallback (e.g. Google Colab)
#
# In a fresh virtualenv or a Colab cell:
#   python -m venv .venv && source .venv/bin/activate   # local only; skip on Colab
#   pip install -r requirements.txt
#
# Colab already ships numpy/scipy/pandas/matplotlib/scikit-learn and a CUDA
# build of PyTorch, so on Colab you typically only need:
#   pip install plantcv ultralytics segment-anything open3d napari
#
# For a GPU PyTorch build locally, install torch/torchvision from
# https://pytorch.org/get-started/locally/ instead of the lines below.

# --- core scientific stack ---
numpy
scipy
pandas
matplotlib
seaborn
jupyterlab
ipywidgets

# --- image processing ---
scikit-image
opencv-python
imageio
tifffile

# --- classical machine learning ---
scikit-learn

# --- plant phenotyping ---
plantcv

# --- deep learning ---
torch
torchvision
ultralytics
segment-anything

# --- interactive viewer (optional locally; not used in headless Colab) ---
napari[all]

# --- 3D / point clouds ---
open3d
